title: Claude Design Tutorial: Build a Website in Minutes with AI
summary: Claude Design is an AI-powered feature by Anthropic that generates website prototypes, landing pages, and presentations from text prompts. The tool offers preset options for prototypes, slide decks, and templates, plus custom design capabilities. Users can generate responsive UI components, layouts, and downloadable code.
